channel.title: homelab on Doing Stuff
channel.description: Recent content in homelab on Doing Stuff

item.title: Homelab Adventure - Part 2: Lets Get Salty
item.description: Welcome to my journey in building my own homelab. This is part of a multi-part series, in the last part I gave an overview of the homelab plan. This one will cover how I handle configuration management.

item.title: Homelab Adventure - Part 1: The Adventure Begins
item.description: Welcome to my journey in building my own homelab. This will hopefully be an ongoing series of blog posts of my adventures in building my own personal infrastructure.
